hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); print(os.path.expanduser(f)) if f else None"); home=$(eval echo ~); case "$file" in "$home/.zsh"*|"$home/.zshrc"*|"$home/.zshenv"*|"$home/.zprofile"*|"$home/.zshrc.local"*|"$home/.zshenv.local"*) echo '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Edit the dotfiles repo, not $HOME directly. Path: .dotfiles/.zsh/ or root config files."}'; exit 2 ;; esac

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); print(f) if f else None"); case "$file" in *.sh) command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && shellcheck "$file" 2>&1 ;; *.zsh) zsh -n "$file" 2>&1 ;; esac
